Fields.Name: Keyboard: Modifier Key ID
Fields.Description: A modifier key on a keyboard.

Fields.Name: Mouse: Modified Key ID
Fields.Description: A modifier key on a mouse.

Fields.Name: Name ID
Fields.Description: The name to use for this key assignment.

Fields.Name: Description ID
Fields.Description: The description to use for this key assignment.

Fields.Name: Direction
Fields.Description: For pad sticks. Works for both X and Y axes.

Fields.Name: Shared Pad Key
Fields.Description: Pad action shared with this when holding Y/Triangle.
